info.description: Introduction block. On the home page this also holds the interactive portfolio grid and the fund-details table.

body.description: Body copy. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

portfolioItems.description: Home page: the grid of portfolio company tiles.

cta.description: Button under the portfolio grid, e.g. EXPLORE THE FUND.

tailHeading.description: Heading for the two-column section below the grid (left column).

tailParagraphs.description: Paragraphs in the left column below the grid. Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

tailCta.description: Button in the left column, e.g. READ OUR PROSPECTUS.

fundDetails.description: Right-column fund-details table (Ticker, NAV, etc.). One row per line.

fundDetailsFootnote.description: Small print under the fund-details table, e.g. 'Updated monthly. Last updated 06/30/2026.'
